Func Name: AT

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,

      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,

      },

        "firstbyte": 6

        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCDeviceIdentifier": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTCDeviceAndFailureTypeOBD": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatusAvailabilityMask": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
